name: Fenergo Client Lifecycle Management API
what_it_does: Fenergo client lifecycle management (CLM) REST API for banks, capital markets firms, asset managers, and financial institutions to automate KYC/AML onboarding, regulatory compliance, and client data management throughout the client lifecycle. Enables AI agents to manage client onboarding workflow orchestration for financial institution client acquisition automation, handle KYC document collection and verification workflow for regulatory due diligence automation, access AML risk assessment and risk appetite rules for compliance automation, retrieve entity data management and legal structure mapping for complex corporate KYC automation, manage regulatory rule engine configuration for multi-jurisdictional compliance automation, handle client review and refresh scheduling for ongoing due diligence automation, access case management and exception workflow for KYC remediation automation, retrieve audit trail and regulatory reporting for compliance examination preparation automation, manage product and account onboarding integration for banking client lifecycle automation, and integrate Fenergo with core banking, CRM, KYC data providers, and sanctions screening platforms for end-to-end client lifecycle management.
use_cases: Onboarding institutional clients from KYC workflow automation agents
Managing regulatory refreshes from ongoing due diligence agents
Assessing AML risk from client risk scoring automation agents
Documenting compliance from regulatory audit preparation agents
not_for: Retail consumer KYC onboarding (use Jumio, Onfido, or Alloy)
Sanctions and adverse media screening (use ComplyAdvantage or Refinitiv)
Credit decisioning and lending workflow (use credit management platforms)
best_when: A bank, capital markets firm, or asset manager wanting AI agents to automate complex institutional client KYC onboarding, multi-jurisdictional regulatory compliance, entity structure mapping, and ongoing client review within Fenergo's enterprise CLM platform.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL INSTITUTION REGULATORY EXAMINATION RISK: Fenergo CLM is core compliance infrastructure; automated configuration changes to regulatory rules or risk scoring without compliance officer approval creates unauthorized change to regulated compliance program; implement mandatory compliance officer approval for automated changes to Fenergo regulatory rules and risk appetite configuration. COMPLEX LEGAL ENTITY ULTIMATE BENEFICIAL OWNER ACCURACY: Automated KYC for corporate entities with complex ownership structures requires accurate ultimate beneficial owner (UBO) identification; automated UBO determination for entities with circular ownership, nominee shareholders, or bearer shares requires manual legal analysis; automated UBO completion without human review for complex structures creates KYC documentation that understates beneficial ownership for high-risk entities. GDPR DATA SUBJECT RIGHTS FOR CLIENT KYC DATA: Fenergo CLM stores extensive client personal and corporate data; GDPR data subject access and erasure rights apply to client KYC data; automated data retention must comply with AML record retention requirements (5-7 years under applicable regulations) before automated data deletion; client data deletion before regulatory retention period creates AML record-keeping violation.

auth.notes: Fenergo uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Dublin, Ireland HQ. Founded 2009 by Marc Murphy. Private (~$700M investment; Vista Equity Partners and ABN AMRO Ventures). Tier 1 and Tier 2 bank client base globally. Multi-jurisdictional regulatory rule engine (FATF, 4AMLD, 5AMLD, MAS, FINRA). Entity data management and legal hierarchy mapping. On-premise and SaaS deployment. Competes with Pega KYC, Oracle Financial Services KYC, and Encompass for enterprise CLM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise annual subscription for financial institutions
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual subscription based on client volume and jurisdiction count; implementation and professional services significant additional cost
pricing.notes: Dublin Ireland. Vista Equity Partners. Enterprise annual subscription. Client volume pricing. Significant implementation cost. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; client and case queries throttled; webhooks for workflow and status events

known_agent_gotchas: REGULATORY RULE ENGINE IS INSTANCE-SPECIFIC CONFIGURATION: Fenergo regulatory rules and risk scoring are configured per institution based on their regulatory obligations and risk appetite; automated integration code cannot assume standard rule behavior across implementations; query Fenergo rule configuration metadata before automated risk assessment to understand institution-specific rule set

WORKFLOW STATE MACHINE COMPLEXITY FOR INSTITUTIONAL ONBOARDING: Fenergo CLM has complex multi-step workflow for institutional client onboarding (initial capture → due diligence → risk assessment → approval → account opening); automated onboarding agents must respect workflow state machine and cannot skip required steps; automated workflow state transition without completing required document collection creates compliance gap in audit trail

ENTITY RELATIONSHIP GRAPH FOR CORPORATE KYC HIERARCHY: Fenergo manages legal entity relationship graphs for corporate KYC; automated corporate entity onboarding must correctly construct parent-subsidiary-UBO relationship hierarchy; automated entity creation without correct relationship mapping creates incomplete legal hierarchy that fails UBO identification requirements

PERIODIC REVIEW SCHEDULING COMPLIANCE REQUIREMENT: Fenergo CLM manages periodic KYC review schedules based on client risk rating; automated review scheduling must respect regulatory-required review frequencies (high risk: annual, medium risk: 2 years, low risk: 3-5 years); automated review scheduling changes without compliance officer approval creates unauthorized modification of regulated due diligence program

IMPLEMENTATION COMPLEXITY TIMEFRAME: Fenergo CLM implementation at financial institutions typically takes 6-24 months; automated integration planning must account for Fenergo implementation timeline; API-based automation cannot be deployed until base Fenergo implementation is complete and tested; plan automated workflow development in parallel with Fenergo implementation, not sequentially
agent_readiness.security_notes: Client lifecycle management. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US/APAC. Client KYC/AML data, regulatory compliance records.

security_score_components.security_notes: CLM. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. EU/US/APAC. Client KYC/AML and regulatory compliance data.
